{{Stub}}

The rotation mode defines the way a block can be placed.

== List of Rotation Modes ==

==== <code>no_rotation</code> ====

==== <code>branch</code> ====

==== <code>carpet</code> ====

==== <code>direction</code> ====

==== <code>fence</code> ====

==== <code>hanging</code> ====

==== <code>ore</code> ====

==== <code>planar</code> ====

==== <code>sign</code> ====

==== <code>stairs</code> ====

==== <code>texture_pile</code> ====

==== <code>torch</code> ====
